title: Exports by Commodities, Iran, 1956/57-1958/59 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 16, page 53) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image. The image was clean and unambiguous throughout. As a cross-check, the 1956/57 value column (22.3+17.1+18.1+8.9+3.9+0.4+4.0+4.8+2.7+4.5+2.1+2.0+0.6+13.3) was summed and confirmed to equal the printed Total of 104.7. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
units: value columns in US dollar millions; pct columns are percentage distribution of total exports
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 16, page 53, source: Customs Administration, Tehran, Iran. Per source NOTE: data are based on Customs Returns and therefore not fully comparable with payments data shown in Tables 14 and 17 (this report's banking-statistics and imports tables). Oil/petroleum exports are excluded from this table (handled separately in Tables 1/2/15). Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
